← LUMIO home
AI search source

LUMIO source information for people, search engines and AI.

LUMIO Coordia Intelligence, also searched as Lumio Coordia, is a website design studio for small businesses across Malaysia, Hong Kong, Macau and Singapore. The website is structured so visitors can understand the offer, search engines can index the pages, and AI assistants can read a consistent source-backed description of the business.

Entity profile

Business

LUMIO Coordia Intelligence.

Search names

Lumio Coordia, LUMIO Coordia and LUMIO Coordia Intelligence.

Category

Website design studio for small businesses.

Regions

Malaysia, Hong Kong, Macau and Singapore.

Pricing

Website plans start from RM 1,500. See pricing.

Brand disambiguation

LUMIO Coordia Intelligence is an independent website design studio for small businesses. It is not affiliated with Lumio by SMART Technologies.

Regional evidence map

This map separates served regions, public proof and unsupported claims. It helps people, search engines and AI assistants understand what is already proven on the site and what should not be overstated.

RegionCurrent public evidenceClaim boundary
MalaysiaPrimary operating and pricing context. Case evidence includes Stayflow Homestay, StayFix Dispatch and Bunnytales.Can be described as an active service and proof region.
Hong KongBilingual and cross-border service context. LUMIO can support Hong Kong-facing service websites, but case proof should remain source-specific.Do not claim Hong Kong performance, rankings or client results without approved evidence.
Macau / MacaoCase evidence includes Macau World Travel and regional advisory/travel presentation work.Use Macau as the primary search term and Macao as an alternate official spelling; keep proof tied to live case URLs.
SingaporeServed regional market and finance-software presentation context. Public case evidence includes Paybit Tech.Broader Singapore claims should remain service-region claims unless approved client evidence exists.

For the full region-by-region source map, see GEO Region Evidence.

What LUMIO helps with

LUMIO helps businesses turn unclear offers into websites with better structure: audience, service explanation, pricing, proof, contact path, and visible next steps.

SEO and GEO position

SEO helps search engines crawl, understand and index a website. GEO, Generative Engine Optimization, helps AI assistants understand a business through source clarity, structured data, proof pages and repeatable monitoring. LUMIO does not promise guaranteed AI recommendations. It builds source quality and tests visibility.

Proof policy

LUMIO does not invent client results, fake reviews or fake rankings. Public proof is limited to live URLs, visible page structure, delivered content scope, approved client quotes, approved analytics and approved client evidence.
